triggered_flags.flag_description: This student has previous attempts, which can indicate accumulated difficulty or re-enrolment risk.
triggered_flags.recommended_action: Check prior attempt context and confirm whether the student needs a catch-up plan.

triggered_flags.flag_description: Submission punctuality is below the expected threshold.
triggered_flags.recommended_action: Use deadline reminders and submit drafts earlier to reduce late-submission risk.

triggered_flags.flag_description: Scores are trending downward across assessments.
triggered_flags.recommended_action: Compare recent feedback with earlier stronger work and intervene before the next assessment.

non_triggered_flags.flag_description: Average score is below the pass threshold for this dataset scale.
non_triggered_flags.recommended_action: Review the weakest assessment topics and schedule tutor support before the next assessment.

non_triggered_flags.flag_description: Engagement score is above the safety threshold.
non_triggered_flags.recommended_action: Maintain a consistent weekly study routine and keep using course resources.

recommended_actions.recommended_action: Check prior attempt context and confirm whether the student needs a catch-up plan.
Use deadline reminders and submit drafts earlier to reduce late-submission risk.
Compare recent feedback with earlier stronger work and intervene before the next assessment.

task_output_contract: Use checklist style: triggered flags first, then non-triggered flags briefly.
For triggered flags, state flag_value versus threshold plus severity, description, support category, and existing recommended_action when supplied.
Do not invent new risk flags or new recommendations outside returned flag evidence.
